response.justification: The candidate is a seasoned, versatile engineer (~15+ years) with solid software craftsmanship, polyglot skills, and some high-throughput systems experience (millions of requests/sec at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic), plus recent AI-tooling work relevant to the AI-first emphasis. However, the role is a Principal/IC6 position specialized in growth and experimentation systems, and the resume shows no direct experience with experimentation platforms, A/B testing, feature flagging, telemetry/metrics infrastructure, or statistical analysis — the core domain of the job. Career history is largely senior-level at small-to-mid-size companies without evidence of principal-scope, multi-team platform ownership at enterprise scale.
strengths: 15+ years of broad engineering experience across web, backend, mobile, and embedded, with strong testing/TDD craftsmanship
High-throughput, low-latency distributed systems experience (millions of HTTP requests/sec) at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic
Recent hands-on AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling work (MCP code generators), aligning with the AI-first mandate
concerns: No demonstrated experimentation, A/B testing, feature-flagging, or growth-measurement platform experience — the role's core domain
No evidence of principal-level scope: multi-workstream leadership, cross-team platform adoption, or enterprise-scale system ownership
Limited telemetry/metrics infrastructure and statistical analysis background relative to the stated data-aptitude requirements

key_factors.factor: Strong general engineering fundamentals and scale exposure
